calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-16-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer/Conveyance Of Property
Off Calendar Nov-03-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Philip Keith for Barbara Beard (Petitioner). Jim Bridgman for and with Viva Habbit Van Assen.

The Court stated that it had reviewed the petition and exhibits. Mr. Keith presented argument in support of the petition. The Court stated that the only thing before it was the issue of whether or not there was a punitive spouse. Additional argument by Mr. Keith. Mr. Beard presented argument in support of their respective position, and stated that before the Court today were two issues: the punitive marriage and the issue of whether the real property is the separate property of Leanar. Additional argument by both parties. At the conclusion of argument, the Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Court Reporter: Denise Doucette, CSR# 5963. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer/Conveyance Of Property
Off Calendar Jul-27-2010 Continued To Oct-08-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgeman for Executrix of will. Philip Keith for Barbara Beard.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to standing and the issue of whether the property is community property or separate property. The matter was set for hearing on October 8, 2010 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 204. Briefs are due by September 10, 2010. Responses are due by September 24, 2010.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petition To Determine Title To And Require Transfer/Conveyance Of Property
Off Calendar Jul-12-2010 Continued To Jul-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar May-18-2010 Continued To Jun-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Philip Keith for Barbara Beard (Daughter of Reginald Williams/Decedent's Husband).

This was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Keith stated that he filed a Petition to Determine Title of Property yesterday, that a will contest was filed in 2003 by the Father of his Client, that the original will was located and that his Client asked him to take a look at the will. The matter was continued to June 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
